comment: App-level settings surfaced to administrators. Per-project runtime configuration lives in the Project extension property scpConfigJson and is edited through the Sprint Capacity Settings widget.

settings.name: Availability reminder lead days
settings.description: Send an availability reminder to unconfirmed participants this many days before Sprint start. Informational only; never blocks.

settings.name: Reconciliation schedule (Quartz cron)
settings.description: Cron expression for the hourly authoritative reconciliation on-schedule workflow.
